member.name: T:Messaggero.Concurrency.KeyPartitionedProcessor`1
member.summary: Dispatches work items to fixed partitions based on a string key. Messages with the same key are always processed sequentially on the same partition. Messages with different keys may be processed concurrently across partitions. Null keys are distributed round-robin across partitions.
member.typeparam: The type of state passed to work items (not used for partitioning).

member.name: M:Messaggero.Concurrency.KeyPartitionedProcessor`1.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The number of partitions (and concurrent workers).

member.name: P:Messaggero.Concurrency.KeyPartitionedProcessor`1.PartitionCount
member.summary: Gets the number of partitions.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Concurrency.KeyPartitionedProcessor`1.EnqueueAsync(System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Enqueues a work item to the partition determined by the key.
member.param: The partition key. Null keys round-robin across partitions.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Concurrency.KeyPartitionedProcessor`1.GetPartitionIndex(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the partition index for a given key using MurmurHash3.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Concurrency.KeyPartitionedProcessor`1.MurmurHash3(System.Byte[],System.UInt32)
member.summary: MurmurHash3 32-bit implementation for deterministic, well-distributed hashing.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Concurrency.KeyPartitionedProcessor`1.StopAsync
member.summary: Signals all partitions to complete and waits for all in-flight work to drain.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Concurrency.KeyPartitionedProcessor`1.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Cancels all processing and disposes resources.

member.name: T:Messaggero.MessageBus
member.summary: Core message bus implementation that orchestrates serialization, transport delegation, subscription management, error strategies, and per-key ordered processing.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBus.#ctor(Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBusTransport,Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageSerializer,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Messaggero.MessageBus})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a single transport (backward compatible).

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBus.#ctor(Messaggero.Routing.ITransportRouter,Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageSerializer,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Messaggero.MessageBus})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a transport router.
member.param: The transport router for resolving transports.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBus.SubscriptionHandle.DrainAndDisposeAsync
member.summary: Drains in-flight work from the processor before disposing the subscription.

member.name: T:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder
member.summary: Builder for configuring the message bus transport, serializer, and reconnection options.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.UseTransport(Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBusTransport)
member.summary: Configures a transport implementation for the message bus. Backward compatible: registers the transport by its Name and sets it as the default.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.AddTransport(Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBusTransport)
member.summary: Registers a named transport. The transport's Name property is used as the key.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.AddTransport(System.String,Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageBusTransport)
member.summary: Registers a named transport with an explicit name override.
member.param: The name to register the transport under.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.UseDefaultTransport(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the default transport used when no routing rule matches.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.RouteDestination(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a destination-based routing rule.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.RouteType``1(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a type-based routing rule.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.RouteType(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a type-based routing rule.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.UseSerializer(Messaggero.Abstractions.IMessageSerializer)
member.summary: Sets a custom message serializer. If not called, the default JSON serializer is used.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.WithReconnection(System.Action{Messaggero.Abstractions.ReconnectionOptions})
member.summary: Configures reconnection behavior with exponential backoff.
member.param: An action to configure reconnection options.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.ConfigureServices(System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection})
member.summary: Registers additional services required by transport extensions.
member.param: An action to configure additional services.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.Validate
member.summary: Validates the builder configuration and throws descriptive errors if required components are missing. Called internally during DI registration to enable fail-fast behavior.
member.exception: Thrown when transport is not configured.

member.name: M:Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder.BuildRouter
member.summary: Builds the transport router from the current configuration.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Resilience.ExponentialBackoffReconnector
member.summary: Implements exponential backoff reconnection logic with configurable parameters. Emits lifecycle events during reconnection attempts and on exhaustion.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Resilience.ExponentialBackoffReconnector.#ctor(Messaggero.Abstractions.ReconnectionOptions,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The reconnection options defining backoff behavior.
The name of the transport being reconnected.

member.name: E:Messaggero.Resilience.ExponentialBackoffReconnector.OnEvent
member.summary: Event raised when a lifecycle event occurs during reconnection.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Resilience.ExponentialBackoffReconnector.ReconnectAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempts to execute the connect action with exponential backoff.
member.param: A token to cancel the reconnection loop.
member.exception: Thrown when max attempts are exhausted.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Routing.PatternSpecificity
member.summary: Specificity levels for destination patterns, ordered from most to least specific.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Routing.PatternSpecificity.Exact
member.summary: No wildcards — exact string match.

member.name: F:Messaggero.Routing.PatternSpecificity.SingleWildcard
member.summary: Contains single-segment wildcard (*) but not multi-segment (**).

member.name: F:Messaggero.Routing.PatternSpecificity.MultiWildcard
member.summary: Contains multi-segment wildcard (**).

member.name: T:Messaggero.Routing.DestinationPattern
member.summary: A compiled glob pattern for allocation-free destination matching. Segments are separated by '.'. '*' matches one segment, '**' matches one or more segments.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Routing.DestinationPattern.RawPattern
member.summary: The original pattern string (e.g., "orders.*").

member.name: P:Messaggero.Routing.DestinationPattern.Specificity
member.summary: The specificity level of this pattern.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Routing.DestinationPattern.IsMatch(System.String)
member.summary: Tests whether the given destination matches this pattern.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Routing.ITransportRouter
member.summary: Resolves the target transport for a given destination and optional message type.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Routing.ITransportRouter.ResolveTransport(System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Resolves the transport to use for the given destination and optional message type.
member.param: Optional CLR message type for type-based routing.
member.exception: No matching rule and no default transport.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Routing.ITransportRouter.Transports
member.summary: All registered transports keyed by name.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Routing.RoutingRule
member.summary: A single routing rule mapping a destination pattern or message type to a named transport. Exactly one of or must be non-null.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Routing.RoutingRule.TransportName
member.summary: Name of the target transport (must match a registered transport).

member.name: P:Messaggero.Routing.RoutingRule.DestinationPattern
member.summary: Compiled glob pattern for destination matching. Null for type-based rules.

member.name: P:Messaggero.Routing.RoutingRule.MessageType
member.summary: CLR type for type-based matching. Null for destination-based rules.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Routing.RoutingRule.ForDestination(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a destination-based routing rule.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Routing.RoutingRule.ForType(System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Creates a type-based routing rule.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Routing.TransportRouter
member.summary: Routes messages to the appropriate transport based on destination patterns, message type hierarchy, and default transport configuration.
Creates a new router and validates all rules at startup.

member.name: T:Messaggero.Serialization.JsonMessageSerializer
member.summary: Default JSON message serializer using System.Text.Json.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Serialization.JsonMessageSerializer.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with default JSON serializer options.

member.name: M:Messaggero.Serialization.JsonMessageSerializer.#ctor(System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with custom JSON serializer options.
member.param: The JSON serializer options to use.

member.name: T:Messaggero.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering the Messaggero message bus with dependency injection.

member.name: M:Messaggero.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMessaggero(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Messaggero.MessageBusBuilder})
member.summary: Adds the Messaggero message bus to the service collection.
member.param: An action to configure the message bus builder.
